mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, sender_id, message_type, message_text, reply_to_message_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{messageText}, #{replyToMessageId}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO chat_message_reactions ( room_id, message_id, requester_user_id, reaction_type, reaction_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{messageId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{reactionType}, #{reactionCode}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, public_id AS publicId, nickname, friend_code AS friendCode, profile_img AS profileImg FROM users WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT cr.room_id AS roomId, cr.room_type AS roomType, cr.room_status AS roomStatus, cr.room_name AS roomName, cr.room_thumbnail AS roomThumbnail, cr.created_by AS createdBy, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.updated_at AS updatedAt, cr.deactivated_at AS deactivatedAt FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN room_members rm ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND cr.room_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.user_id IN (#{user1}, #{user2}) GROUP BY cr.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rm.user_id) = 2 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm2 WHERE rm2.room_id = cr.room_id ) = 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_type, room_name, room_thumbnail, room_status, created_by ) VALUES ( #{roomType}, #{roomName}, #{roomThumbnail}, #{roomStatus}, #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO room_members ( room_id, user_id, role, custom_room_name, custom_room_thumbnail, custom_room_back_ground, member_status ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{customRoomName}, #{customRoomThumbnail}, #{customRoomBackground}, #{memberStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT user_id AS userId, public_id AS publicId, nickname, friend_code AS friendCode, profile_img AS profileImg FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND public_id IN
#{publicId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_message_attachments SET message_id = #{messageId}, attachment_status = 'ATTACHED', attached_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND attachment_status = 'TEMP' AND attachment_id IN
#{attachmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT attachment_id AS attachmentId, message_id AS messageId, room_id AS roomId, uploader_user_id AS uploaderUserId, file_url AS fileUrl, original_file_name AS originalFileName, content_type AS contentType, file_size AS fileSize, attachment_kind AS attachmentKind, attachment_status AS attachmentStatus, width, height, duration_ms AS durationMs, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM chat_message_attachments WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND attachment_status = 'ATTACHED' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, attachment_id ASC
